StringResource:
&ValueInterlocksStrRC; &SetpointInterlocksStrRC;
501,Offline data item 502, failed to execute safe action 503, for detail info please check log file 511,device offline alarm. 512,device offline alarm. 513,'s Safety Action failed . 514, Action failed. 515, IOData Queue Too Long. 516, IOData Queue Too Long. 517, Communication Error. 518, The module cannot operate due to a communication error. 519, The module is not at its transfer [position] position. 520, The module must be at the correct position for material transfer. 521, The module is not prepared to process material. 522, The module is not prepared for process material. 523, The process is failed. 524, The module was processing when an error occurred. 525, The module is not prepared for material transfer. 526, The module is not prepared for material transfer. 527, robot extended into this module for over time. 529, The robot has held the RequestToExtend signal high for over 538, The Slot Valve is not closed. 539, This operation requires that the slot valve be closed. 540, The recipe name is null. Can't process. 541, The recipe name is null. Can't process. 542, activeHandoff timed out on port.please see port detail at alarm description. A material transfer operation was armed on port , but the expected transition of the 'Extended' signal to 'Active' did not occur before the operation timed out. 543, activeHandoff timed out on port.please see port detail at alarm description. A material transfer operation was armed on port , but the expected transition of the 'Extended' signal to 'Active' did not occur before the operation timed out. 544, Module not in proper mode for this operation. 545, A client has attempted to use a service of the module when its Status is not in the correct state. Overriding this restriction may cause misoperation and damage to equipment. See the tool log for details. 546, Module must be in maintenance mode for this operation. 547, A client has attempted to use a service of the module when its Status is not Maintenance. See the tool log for details. 548, Module has aborted due to internal error. 549, Module has aborted. A request was made which could not be satisfied due an internal error. See the module syslog for details. 550, Failed to retrieve process recipe. 551, Failed to retrieve process recipe.Reasons for this alarm:1. The recipe is corrupt.2. The recipe does not exist in this PM.3. Recipe name does not match case of PM recipe ( Recipe and class names are case sensitive.) 552, The recipe [recipe name] is invalid for the module. 553, The recipe for processing material is empty. 554, Wafer status in PM is not Present before pick.please check. 555, Wafer status in PM is not Present before pick. 556, Wafer status in PM is not Absent before place. please check. 557, Wafer status in PM is not Absent before place.
654, Dry Pump has fault. 655, Dry Pump has alarm or warning when turn on. 656, more than max setup pressure. 657, the chamber leakback rate is more than maximum setup pressure. 658, the value of the chamber leakback is below zero. 659, the value of the chamber leakback is below zero. 660, out of normal leakback rate. 661, The chamber leakback rate is bigger than the normal value. 662, out of normal leakback rate. 663, The gas leakback rate is bigger than the normal value. 664, chamber leak rate is abnormal. 665, chamber leak rate is abnormal when do gas leak rate. 666, chamber temperature is abnormal. 667, chamber temperature is abnormal when do gas leak rate. 668, gas zero drift detected. 669, gas zero drift soft alarm. 670, gas zero drift detected. 671, gas zero drift hard alarm. 672, slot valve is open. 673, the slot valve is open during the required action. 674, Process failed to reach stable condition. 675, Process failed to reach stable condition. 676, Min endpoint time is greater than Max endpoint time. 677, Min endpoint time is greater than Max endpoint time. /nMax has been set to Min plus 60 for this step but you need to modify the recipe. 678, Endpoint signal was catched before Recipe parameter:MinEDPTime. 679, Endpoint signal was catched before Recipe parameter:MinEDPTime. 680, Endpoint type step failed to receive endpoint when max endpoint time is over. 681, Failed to receive endpoint when max endpoint time is over. /nPlease modify the max endpoint time in the recipe. 682, Recipe process stopped with end type step. 683, Recipe process stopped with end type step. 684, top temp failed to reach stable condition. 685, top temp failed to reach stable condition. 686, service execute failed for IO error. Please see alarm decription for details. 687, IO error is 688, service execute failed. Please see alarm decription for details. 689, failed for 690, ESCDC clamp voltage tolerance timeout occured. 691, ESC failed to reach setpoint in time during Chuck. 692, Helium Evac timeout occured. 693, Helium failed to evac in time during DECHUCK. 694, LFMatch failed to set CControlTControl. 695, LFMatch failed to set CControlTControl. 696, RF failed to reach stable condition. 697, RF failed to reach stable condition during process. 698, Pressure failed to reach stable condition. 699, Pressure failed to reach stable condition during process. 700, LifeCounter exeed soft threshold. 701, LifeCounter exeed soft threshold. 702, LifeCounter exeed hard threshold. 703, LifeCounter exeed hard threshold. 704, Error or Fatal alarm exist. 705, Error or Fatal alarm exist! Operation can not be done. 706, Process is interrupted. 707, Process is interrupted. 708, DryClean is interrupted. 709, DryClean is interrupted. 710, the chiller Temprature in recipe differ from setup. 711, the chiller Temprature in recipe differ from setup during executing recipe. 712, chiller's temp not reach to the recipe's temp and timeout. 713, chiller's temp not reach to the recipe's temp during executing recipe.
810, Dry Pump is not at remote mode. 811, Dry Pump can not execute command when it is not at remote mode. 812, Dry Pump has fault. 813, Dry Pump has alarm or warning. 814, Cannot read pressure, reading the Gauge failed. 815, An attempt was made to read an offline gauge. 816, Alarm for io failure. 817, Alarm for io failure. 818, Alarm for interlock.
821, Operation failed due to component IO Failed. 822, Alarm for Component IO Failed. 823, Operation failed due to component timeout. 824, Alarm for Component timeout. 825, Leaving maintenance mode. please turn off the maintenance KEY TC.MANF and KEY LID.DIS. 826, Leaving maintenance mode. please turn off the maintenance KEY TC.MANF and KEY LID.DIS. 827, Timout has occurred during vent. 828, Alarm for vent time out. 829, Timout has occurred during pumpdown. 830, Alarm for pumpdown time out. 831, Operation failed due to component IO Failed, 832, Alarm for Component IO Failed. 833, Operation failed due to component timeout. 834, Alarm for Component timeout. 835, Operation failed due to pressure out of tollerance. 836, Alarm for Vacuum System state check failed pressure was not in tollerance after state was executed. 837, Unable to locate the gas valve. 838, Alarm for pressure controller. a sequence was created to flow a gas but the gas valve was not configured. 839, The chamber is not isolated. 840, Alarm for a vacuum operation that was requested but the chamber is not isloated. 841, pressure Controll Failed. 842, Can not do pressure controll when MFC calibration is not done.
861, The pressure has exceeded the setpoint. 862, The pressure monitor detected that the pressure has exceeded setpoint. 863, Pressure is below setpoint. 864, The pressure monitor detected that the pressure has gone below the setpoint. 865, IO failed for the deivce. 866, operate the device failed . please check the driver or device. 867, Pump start timed out. 868, Alarm for pump not starting within specified time. 869, Pump error has occured. 870, Alarm for pump detected error. 871, The pump was unable to reach the setpoint for use. 872, Alarm for pump not reaching setpoint. 873, The recovery of the shared pump failed. 874, The shared pump was unable to restore the shared pump users.
10010,Parameter of slot number is out of range! 10011,Detect Wafer Service : Parameter of slot number is out of range! 10020,Plateform Extend command has been issued. but action is not execute successfully! 10021,Plateform Extend command has been issued. but action is not execute successfully! 10030,Plateform Retract command has been issued. but action is not execute successfully! 10031,Plateform Retract command has been issued. but action is not execute successfully! 10040,Go Load Position command has been issued. but action is not execute successfully! 10041,Go Load Position command has been issued. but action is not execute successfully! 10050,service failed for IO error 10051,Offline data item 10060,Unknown IO Exception 10061,Unknown IO Exception 10070,LPI ERROR 10071,LPI ERROR 10080,LPI BUSY 10081,LPI BUSY 10090,NO POD 10091,NO POD 10100,NOT READY 10101,NOT READY 10110,INVALLD ARG 10111,INVALLD ARG 10120,Failed or Denied 10121,Failed or Denied 10130,hardware Alarm 10131,hardware Alarm 10140,hardware Error 10141,hardware Error 10150,POD OPEN 10151,POD OPEN 10160,POD CLOSE 10161,POD CLOSE 10170,Home ERR 10171,Home ERR 10180,CAS UnLoad 10181,CAS UnLoad 10190,CAS Load 10191,CAS Load 10200,Fetch 10201,Fetch 10210,CLOSE LATCH 10211,CLOSE LATCH 10220,OPEN LATCH 10221,OPEN LATCH 10230,command TimeOut 10231,command TimeOut 10240,IO failed 10241,IO failed 10250,Carrier property cannot be updated - carrier is Docked 10251,Update property when carrier is Absent or not Docked yet. 10260,Unsupported 10261,Unsupported 10270,Unsupported 10271,Unsupported 10280,Unsupported 10281,Unsupported 10290,Unsupported 10291,Unsupported 10300,Unsupported 10301,Unsupported 10310,Unsupported 10311,Unsupported 10320,Unsupported 10321,Unsupported 10330,Unsupported 10331,Unsupported 10340,Unsupported 10341,Unsupported 10350,Unsupported 10351,Unsupported 10360,Unsupported 10361,Unsupported 10370,Unsupported 10371,Unsupported 10380,Unsupported 10381,Unsupported 10390,Unsupported 10391,Unsupported 10400,Robot is extended into VCE when some action will be acted! 10401,Robot is extended into VCE when some action will be acted! 10410,Some action can't execute without Cassette! 10411,Some action can't execute without Cassette! 10420,doorOpenAlm 10421,doorOpenAlm 10430,waferslideoutAlm 10431,waferslideoutAlm 10440,pltOut4IDxAlarm 10441,pltOut4IDxAlarm 10450,notLoad4ExtAlm 10451,notLoad4ExtAlm 10460,vceInitSlideOut 10461,vceInitSlideOut 10470,slotIndexOutOfRange 10471,slotIndexOutOfRange 10480,airOffAlarm 10481,airOffAlarm 10490,isWaferSlideOut 10491,isWaferSlideOut 10500,Load lock chamber is not at atmosphere status when Open Door of VCE will be executed! 10501,Load lock chamber is not at atmosphere status when Open Door of VCE will be executed! 10510,initCassetteAlm 10511,initCassetteAlm 10520,errorGettingElevErrorExcAlarm 10521,errorGettingElevErrorExcAlarm 10530,elevatorCommErrorAlarm 10531,elevatorCommErrorAlarm 10540,elevatorActionErrorAlarm 10541,elevatorActionErrorAlarm 10550,elevatorCommandErrorAlarm 10551,elevatorCommandErrorAlarm 10560,elevatorLoadErrorAlarm 10561,elevatorLoadErrorAlarm 10570,elevatorMoveErrorAlarm 10571,elevatorMoveErrorAlarm 10580,elevatorRAxisErrorAlarm 10581,elevatorRAxisErrorAlarm 10590,elevatorSErrorAlarm 10591,elevatorSErrorAlarm 10600,elevatorEnvErrorAlarm 10601,elevatorEnvErrorAlarm 10610,elevatorM0ErrorAlarm 10611,elevatorM0ErrorAlarm 10620,elevatorS4ErrorAlarm 10621,elevatorS4ErrorAlarm 10630,elevatorErrorAlarm 10631,elevatorErrorAlarm 10640,materialSlideoutAlarm 10641,materialSlideoutAlarm 10650,Door is not closed or Plantform is not retract when Home LPI will be execute! 10651,Door is not closed or Plantform is not retract when Home LPI will be execute! 10660,There is no Cassette when Fetch will be executed! 10661,There is no Cassette when Fetch will be executed! 10670,Door is not closed or Plantform is not retract when Close Pod will be execute! 10671,Door is not closed or Plantform is not retract when Close Pod will be execute! 10680,There is not pod on LPI when OpenPod service running. 10681,Pod is needed when open Pod is executed! 10690,Plantform is not out Or Cassette is not present when Unload service will be run! 10691,Plantform is not out Or Cassette is not present when Unload service will be run! 10700,The previous service is not Fetch. 10701,The previous service of Load service must be Fetch, but it is not true now! 10710,Plantform of VCE is out when Load service of LPI will be run. 10711,Plantform of VCE is out when Load service of LPI will be run. 10720,LPI had run Load service more than 60s 10721,LPI had run Load service more than 60s, so it think some error is happened. 10730,Cassette is on VCE! 10731,Cassette is not on VCE when Load will be going on LPI 10740,Cassette is not on VCE! 10741,Cassette is not on VCE when Unload will be going on LPI 10750,Wafer is Present when Complete Wafer! 10751,Wafer is Present when Complete Wafer! 10760,VCE is not at correct status when Recovery 10761,Plantform is not In when Recovery service is going to running. 10770,VCE is not at correct status when ErrorLoad. 10771,Plantform is not In when ErrorLoad service is going to running. 10780,VCE is not at correct status when ErrorUnload. 10781,Plantform is not In when ErrorUnload service is going to running. 10790,VCE is not at correct status when ErrorHome. 10791,Plantform is not In when ErrorHome service is going to running. 10800,Error found in Prepare wafer service 10801,Error found in Prepare wafer service: error status in the slot! 10810,Error found in Complete wafer service 10811,Error found in Complete wafer service: error status in the slot! 10820,Latch started without pod 10821,Latch started without pod! 10830,Unload Sequence Started without Cassette on VCE! 10831,Unload Sequence Started without Cassette on VCE!
10840,Unsupported 10841,Unsupported 10850,Unsupported 10851,Unsupported 10860,Unsupported 10861,Unsupported 10870,Unsupported 10871,Unsupported 10880,Unsupported 10881,Unsupported 10890,Unsupported 10891,Unsupported 10900,Unsupported 10901,Unsupported 10910,Unsupported 10911,Unsupported 10920,Unsupported 10921,Unsupported 10930,Unsupported 10931,Unsupported 10940,Unsupported 10941,Unsupported 10950,Unsupported 10951,Unsupported 10960,Unsupported 10961,Unsupported 10970,Unsupported 10971,Unsupported 10980,Unsupported 10981,Unsupported 10990,Unsupported 10991,Unsupported 11000,Unsupported 11001,Unsupported 11010,Unsupported 11011,Unsupported 11020,Unsupported 11021,Unsupported 11030,Unsupported 11031,Unsupported 11040,Unsupported 11041,Unsupported 11050,Unsupported 11051,Unsupported 11060,Unsupported 11061,Unsupported 11070,Unsupported 11071,Unsupported 11080,Unsupported 11081,Unsupported 11090,Unsupported 11091,Unsupported
11100,Wafer slide out detected. 11101,Wafer slide out detected during operation. 11110,Robot arm extended in load port module. 11111,Robot arm extended in load port module. 11120,Robot is not ready to map. 11121,Robot can not map station with wafer on arm. 11130,Cannot map; no carrier detected. 11131,The map service cannot be performed because no carrier is detected. 11140,Cannot map; door is closed. 11141,The map service cannot be performed because the load port door is closed. 11150,Mapping failed. either FindBias error or MappingError reported 11151,The map service failed to produce a correct mapping. 11160,Communication Error with the mapper 11161,The map service failed to produce a correct mapping. 11170,Mapper cannot be controlled. locked out by CDM 11171,The map service failed to produce a correct mapping. 11180,Mapper cannot map due to tool emergency stop being active 11181,The map service failed to produce a correct mapping. 11190,General Undefined Robot Error during map 11191,The map service failed to produce a correct mapping. 11200,Invalid wafer placed detected. 11201,A cross slotted wafer or a double placed wafer has been detected. 11210,Obstruction detected in loadport. 11211,There may be an obstruction in the loadport. 11220,Invalid slot selected. 11221,Invalid slot selected. The slot selected is out of range of the current configuration. 11230,Cannot read carrier id. carrier absent. 11231,The module cannot read the carrier id because the carrier is absent. Place the carrier onto the load port and retry. 11240,Time out in read/write of carrier tag/id. 11241,A time out has occured during the reading/writing of the carrier tag/id. 11250,Read/write of carrier tag/id failed 11251,The reading/writing of the carrier tag has failed. Possible causes are the device physically failed to read/write the carrier tag or the device/driver is offline. 11260,Cannot read/write carrier tag. carrierTag absent. 11261,The module cannot read or write to the carrier tag because the carrierTag is absent. Place a carrier with a tag onto the load port and retry. 11270,Carrier tag read failure. 11271,This module had a failure during the reading of the carrier tag 11280,Carrier tag write failure. 11281,This module had a failure during the writing of the carrier tag 11290,latch closed. 11291,latch closed when extended paddle. 11300,Pod not properly placed. 11301,Pod not properly placed when clamping the pod.
20000,Operation Failed.please see ErrorId and Error massage in alarm description.
20010,Robot Service timed out 20011,Robot Service timed out
20020,delta Radius too large to perform aligner pick 20021,The robot has been asked to perform a delta pick with too large a radial offset
20030,Robot operation failed.The robot module is either busy or in an error state or is offline.please see ErrorId and Error massage in alarm description.
20040,Unknown robot hardware failure.Verify the robot map before proceeding.please see Error message in alarm description.
20050,The tool emergency stop is currently active. 20051,The operation failed because the tool emergency stop is currently active.
20060,Robot operation failed because the CDM is in control of the robot. The CDM must be off to perform this service. 20061,Robot operation failed because the CDM is in control of the robot. The CDM must be off to perform this service.
20070,The robot operation failed for an error from device,please see ErrorId in alarm description.
20080,Mapper is not at right state when map station. 20081,can not map station when robot has wafer on arm.
20090,Map station failed,Find bias or other map problem.please see ErrorId and Error massage in alarm description.
20100,Find Bias required before mapping station. 20101,Robot has not been taught to map current station.
20110,Material at Aligner is out of CCD range. 20111,Material at Aligner is out of CCD range and cannot be scanned.
20120,No wafer detected at Aligner. 20121,No wafer detected at Aligner before scan.
20130,Invalid wafer size for Aligner. 20131,Invalid wafer size for Aligner.
20140,Communication with Aligner timed out. 20141,Communication with Aligner timed out during service.
20150,Communication with Aligner not initialized. 20151,Communication with Aligner not initialized before attempting service.
20160,Aligner hardware failed. 20161,Aligner hardware failed.
20170,Communication between Robot and Aligner failed.please see ErrorId and Error massage in alarm description.
20180,Secondary serial port timed out during service. 20181,Robot did not receive confirmation that secondary serial port completed service.
20190,Secondary serial port busy. 20191,Secondary serial port in use while another command was issued.
20200,Aligner had unknown failure during service.please see ErrorId and Error massage in alarm description.
20210,Command is dangerous when 300mm wafer is on aligner. 20211,There is 300mm wafer on aligner. any command except Pick from Aligner may damage it.
20220,Aligner failed during Set Vacuum On/Off. 20221,Aligner failed during Set Vacuum On/Off.
20230,Communication with Aligner timed out. 20231,Communication with Aligner timed out during Set Vacuum On/Off.
20240,Communication not initialized. 20241,Communication with Aligner not initialized before Set Vacuum On/Off.
20250,Secondary serial port timed out. 20251,Secondary serial port timed out during Set Vacuum On/Off.
20260,Secondary serial port busy during Set Vacuum On/Off. 20261,Secondary serial port busy during Set Vacuum On/Off.
20270,Communication failed during Set Vacuum On/Off. 20271,Communication between Acutran and Aligner failed during Set Vacuum On/Off.
20280,The given slot was already extended by other robot arm. 20281,The robot cannot extend into the given slot. It might be extended by other robot.
20290,Place failed: Material found on arm after Place. 20291,Place failed: Material found on arm after Place.
20300,Pick failed: Material not found on arm after Pick. 20301,Pick failed: Material not found on arm after Pick.
20310,Robot cannot perform service: There is no carrier. 20311,The robot cannot perform the service because there is no carrier present in the loadport station.
20320,The robot cannot retract from the station. 20321,The robot has timed out waiting for the station to signal that it is okay to retract from the module.
20330,The robot cannot extend into the station. 20331,The robot has timed out waiting for the station to signal that it is okay to extend into the module.
20340,Robot cannot perform service: Arm is out of range. 20341,Robot cannot perform service because the arm is out of range.
20350,Robot cannot perform service: Slot is out of range. 20351,Robot cannot perform service because the slot is out of range for the station.
20360,Robot cannot perform service: Station is out of range. 20361,Robot cannot perform service because the station is out of range.
20370,Robot can't pick material, material properties can't be confirmed. 20371,The robot can't pick material from the station because the station's material size. shape or other property is incompatible with the robot end-effector.
20380,Robot can't place material, material properties can't be confirmed. 20381,The robot can't place material into the station because the current material size. shape or other property is incompatible with the station location.
20390,Unable to perform service, robot requires two arms. 20391,Robot can't swap material because the robot is not configured for dual arms.
20400,material has not been aligned. 20401,Robot cannot pick material from aligner as the material has not been aligned.
20410,Cannot perform service: no aligner in system. or invaild station. 20411,Robot cannot perform the service because there is no aligner present in the system.or the station ready to pick is not a Aligner.
20420,Wrong Z position to extend. 20421,Robot cannot perform service because the Z position is incorrect.
20430,There is an obstruction at the destination station. 20431,Robot cannot perform service because the destination station is obstructed. Verify that slot valves or doors are not closed and that there are no wafer slide outs.
20440,Can't place: material present in station. 20441,Robot can't place material because there is material present in the destination station.
20450,Can't pick:no material in station. 20451,Robot can't pick material from the station because there is no material.
20460,Can't place: no material on Arm B. 20461,Robot can't place material because there is no material present on Arm B.
20470,Can't place: no material on Arm A. 20471,Robot can't place material because there is no material present on Arm A.
20480,Can't pick: material present on Arm B. 20481,Robot can't pick material because there is already material present on Arm B.
20490,Can't pick: material present on Arm A. 20491,Robot can't pick material because there is already material present on Arm A.
20500,Call to physical robot failed. 20501,Due to exception received from physical robot this alarm posted.
20510,Invalid number of wafers in cassette. 20511,Invalid number of wafers in cassette for wafer cycling.
20520,FFU in invalide mode. 20521,Can't set value when FFU in AUTO mode(change to MANUAL mode first.).
21000,Isolation Valve not in proper mode for this operation. 21001,Isolation Valve not in proper mode for this operation.
21010,Material may need aligning but no aligner available. 21011,Material may need aligning but no aligner available.
21020,Try to open but Module does not exist,please see alarm description.
21030,Module does not exist to open Slot Valve by Iso Policy Mgr 21031,Module does not exist to open Slot Valve by Iso Policy Mgr
21040,Try to close but Module does not exist,please see alarm description.
21050,IO used for opening is offline which Module please see alarm description.
21060,An interlock occurred while opening which Module please see alarm description.
21070,A timeout has occured while opening which Module please see alarm description.
21080, An error occured while opening which Module please see alarm description.
21090, IO used for closing is offline which Module please see alarm description.
21100, Timeout has occured while closing which Module please see alarm description.
21110, An error occured while closing which Module please see alarm description.
21120, There is an obstruction that has to be cleared before performing this operation,which Module please see alarm description.
21130, Pressure difference too great to open which Module please see alarm description.
30001,Can't align: no material in aligner 30002,The aligner can't align because there is no material present in the aligner 30003,Map material in aligner to determine material size 30004,Invalid material in aligner 30005,The aligner can't perform the intended function because the material size is unspecified 30006,The aligner cannot set the material size because the material size cannot be determined 30007,Aligner operation failed 30008,Aligner communications error or bad parameter error 30009,The aligner operation failed because the aligner has an error 30010,Communication with Aligner timed out 30011,Communication with Aligner not initialized 30012,Robot Service: timed out 30013,Aligner is offline.Verify command completed successfully 30014,Aligner is offline and may not have completed its service.Verify map before retrying service!
30015,service failed for IO error 30016,IO error is
30017,Aligner communication failed 30018,Communication between Robot and Aligner failed. 30019,Aligner hardware failed 30020,Communication with Aligner not initialized 30021,Communication with Aligner not initialized before attempting service. 30022,Communication with Aligner timed out 30023,Communication with Aligner timed out during service 30024,Invalid wafer size for Aligner 30025,Invalid wafer size for Aligner 30026,No wafer detected at Aligner 30027,No wafer detected at Aligner before scan 30028,Material at Aligner is out of CCD range 30029,Material at Aligner is out of CCD range and cannot be scanned 30030,Aligner Material characterization failure 30031,Aligner Material characterization failure
30032,Wafer slide out detected. 30033,Wafer slide out detected during operation. 30034,Ignore and Continue 30035,Robot arm extended in load port module. 30036,Robot arm extended in load port module. 30037,Mapping failed, either FindBias error or MappingError reported 30038,The map service failed to produce a correct mapping. 30039,Ignore and Continue 30040,Communication Error with the mapper 30041,The map service failed to produce a correct mapping. 30042,Ignore and Continue 30043,Mapper cannot be controlled, locked out by CDM 30044,The map service failed to produce a correct mapping. 30045,Mapper cannot map due to tool emergency stop being active 30046,The map service failed to produce a correct mapping. 30047,General Undefined Robot Error during map 30048,The map service failed to produce a correct mapping. 30049,Ignore and Continue 30050,Invalid wafer placed detected. 30051,A cross slotted wafer or a double placed wafer has been detected. 30052,Ignore and Continue
30075,Aligner operation failed 30076,Aligner had unknown failure during service
30053,Heater execute SetTemp failed. 30054,The service failed for .
30055,Spider failed to raise 30056,The object cannot raise spider. 30057,Spider failed to lower 30058,The object cannot lower spider. 30059,service failed for IO error 30060,IO error is . 30061,Spider failed to raise for timeout 30062,Spider failed to lower for timeout
30063,VBE Robot arm extended in load block elevator. 30064,VBE Robot arm extended in load block elevator 30065,ATM Robot arm extended in load block elevator. 30066,ATMRobot arm extended in load block elevator.
30069,Elevator Service: timed out 30070,Elevator Service: timed out 30071,service failed for IO error 30072,IO error is 30073,Wait for command 30074,time out!
30077,Air not available for loadblock 30078,: Air pressure is required to actuate any pneumatic valves.
30081,Cannot close the atmospheric door for loadblock 30082,The atmospheric door has failed to close for
30084,Vacuum Slot Valve failed to close in loadblock 30085,The operation to close the vacuum slot valve has failed in
30089,Vacuum Slot Valve failed to open in loadblock 30090,The operation to open the vacuum slot valve has failed in
30093,Vacuum Slot Valve is not closed in loadblock 30094,This operation requires that the vacuum slot valve be close in
30097,Vacuum Slot Valve is not open in loadblock 30098,This operation requires that the vacuum slot valve be open in
30101,Interlock tripped closing atmospheric door. 30102,An interlock occured while closing the atmospheric door of
30105,Error while mapping loadblock 30106,An error occurred during mapping of
30109,Cannot open the atmospheric door for loadblock 30110,The atmospheric door has failed to open for
30111,catch exception during pumpdown 30112,catch exception during pumpdown
30113,service failed for IO error 30114,IO error is 30115,Interlock tripped opening loadblock atmospheric door. 30116,An interlock occured while opening the atmospheric door of 30117,Read BarCode timeout. 30118,Read BarCode timeout.please map the bar.
30119,OCD Command Failed 30120,The service failed for 30121,OCD Command Load Failed 30122,OCD Command Select Failed 30123,OCD Command Start Failed 30124,OCD Command Pause Failed 30125,OCD Command Resume Failed 30126,OCD Command Abort Failed 30127,OCD Command WaferPresence Failed 30128,OCD Command CurrentState Failed 30129,OCD Command Stop Failed 30130,OCD Command SetId Failed 30131,OCD Command Result Failed 30132,OCD Command Recipe Failed
30133,process timeout 30134,process timeout 30135,The device currentStatus is Error during the measurement 30136,errorMsg 30137,Map is not allowed 30138,Map operation is not allowed when ocd status is run or paused. 30139,The operation is not allowed 30140,The operation is not allowed
30141,Error reading material ID 30142,Check ReadStatus for information. 30143,ID reader device is offline 30144,ID reader device is offline - check power or cable. 30145,Reading material ID error 30146,Error occurred from the device during the reading of the material ID. 30147,Override material ID 30148,Clear alarm and disable the Mateial ID Reader 30149,Communication error reading material ID 30150,Communication error could be BadPackage. TimeOut or No End. 30151,Override material ID 30152,Clear alarm and disable the Mateial ID Reader
&ExceptionStrRC;
